title: ExpenseDetail
description: The full representation of an expense entry

allocationState.description: The allocation status of this expense

isPersonalExpense.description: Whether this is a non-reimbursable personal expense

isExpenseRejected.description: Whether the expense has been rejected by an approver

isPaperReceiptReceived.description: Whether a physical receipt has been received

hasExceptions.description: Whether the expense has policy exceptions

lastModifiedDate.description: When the expense was last modified (ISO 8601)
